summary: Phase 2C: Satisfied by SRC 3 implementation (post-correctness-patch). lcs.fn_promote_emission(uuid) for atomic single-row promotion (FOR UPDATE lock → validate STAGED → CID mint → fn_process_cid handoff → PROMOTED) and lcs.fn_promote_emission_batch(int) for deterministic batch promotion (ORDER BY created_at, return count). Error paths: log lcs_errors → UPDATE status REJECTED → RETURN clean. No RAISE after state mutation. Batch uses return-state logic, no exception control flow. Adapts WP ingest_status/RECEIVED to live status/STAGED. 9 enforcement tests across 4 categories.

payload.correctness_patch_detail: Removed all RAISE EXCEPTION after error logging. Batch wrapper uses return-state logic instead of EXCEPTION block. Error state is never rolled back.
payload.atomic_flow: Lock → validate STAGED → INSERT cid_intake → fn_process_cid() → SID + MID → status = PROMOTED
payload.error_flow: Log lcs_errors → UPDATE emission status (REJECTED/ERROR) → RETURN clean
payload.schema_adaptation: WP referenced ingest_status/RECEIVED/emitted_at; adapted to existing status/STAGED/created_at from Phase 2A
